nodes.name: enrichment-agent.md
nodes.summary: Defines the Enrichment Agent subagent spec for the lead-intelligence skill, instructing it to pull comprehensive person, company, and activity data from Exa, X API, GitHub, and the web for qualified prospects and output a structured enriched profile with personalization hooks.

nodes.name: mutual-mapper.md
nodes.summary: Defines the Mutual Mapper Agent subagent spec, which analyzes the user's X social graph against scored prospects to identify warm introduction paths, classifies them by warmth type, and ranks mutual connections by their introduction potential using a weighted scoring table.

nodes.name: outreach-drafter.md
nodes.summary: Defines the Outreach Drafter Agent subagent spec for generating personalized, anti-spam outreach messages (warm intro requests, cold emails, X DMs, and follow-up sequences) from enriched lead data, with explicit writing rules prohibiting AI filler language and enforcing brevity.

nodes.name: signal-scorer.md
nodes.summary: Defines the Signal Scorer Agent subagent spec for searching and ranking high-value prospects across X, Exa, and LinkedIn using a weighted rubric covering role alignment, industry match, recent activity, influence, location, and engagement overlap.
